title: Random Enchant
description: Every block broken gives random enchants to random items
body:
## Disclaimer
This pack has been made only for a concept video and might not be very suitable for any survival worlds. But i uploaded it to allow anyone to enjoy this experience.

### Info
  This datapack is in some way the port of an old mod that does exactly the same thing. Exept here its a datapack that, for the moment, only "properly" works in 1.21.5. May work in all 1.21+ versions but will have some blocks missing from the list.
If you need a port to another version OR more customisation, notice me and i'll see if i'll do it.
Anyway..
Have fun playing this nightmare ! ;)

### Useful Commands
- Credits :
/function tweaks:credits
- Deactivate the block counter :
/function alltheblocks:uninstall
- Global enchant level cap :
/scoreboard players set MAX_ENCHANT_LEVEL constants 30
- Minimun items in inventory required to activate enchant rolls :
/scoreboard players set MIN_ITEM_COUNT constants 0

n.b : Silk touch isn't present to allow fortune to work properly

### Here are some links recommended with the datapack ###

To see the higher enchants levels :
https://www.planetminecraft.com/texture-pack/enchantment-level-fix/

To be able to scroll the tooltip, thus allowing to see all of it when its too big for the screen : 
https://modrinth.com/mod/tooltip-scroll
